hero.title: Show the world you mean business.
hero.subtitle: Meta Verified helps you build trust with new customers and protect your brand.
hero.congrats: Congratulations on meeting the requirements to upgrade your page to a verified blue badge! This is a great milestone reflecting the dedication and trust you've built with your audience.
benefits.title: Discover the benefits of Meta Verified for business.
benefits.subtitle: Meta Verified provides tools to help you build trust with new audiences, protect your brand, and engage more effectively with customers.
benefits.badge.desc: The badge means your profile has been verified by Meta based on your activity on Meta technologies, or information or documents you've provided.
benefits.impersonation.desc: Protect your brand with proactive impersonation monitoring. Meta will remove accounts we determine are impersonating you.
benefits.support.desc: Access email or chat support 24/7 for account issues.
benefits.profile.desc: Enrich your profile by adding images to links to increase engagement.
steps.title: Sign up for Meta Verified.
steps.subtitle: Our verification process is designed to maintain the integrity of the verified badge for businesses.
steps.1.title: Start your application.
steps.1.desc: Those who want to sign up for Meta Verified need to register and meet certain eligibility requirements (requirements for Facebook and Instagram). When starting, you should have your business contact information ready.
steps.2.title: Verify business details.
steps.2.desc: You may be asked to share details such as business name, address, website and/or phone number.
steps.3.title: Get reviewed.
steps.3.desc: We will review your application and send status updates within three business days.
testimonial.title: See how Meta Verified has helped real businesses.
connection.title: Every connection is an opportunity. This is Your World.
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I know if my business is eligible?
faq.a1: Meta Verified is available for businesses that meet certain eligibility requirements in selected regions. You need to register and meet the eligibility requirements to apply.
faq.q2: How do I update my information if I'm not yet eligible?
faq.a2: Join the waitlist for updates. We'll notify you when Meta Verified for Business is available for you.
faq.q3: What if I already have a verified badge?
faq.a3: No action is needed to keep your badge. Current badge holders can subscribe to a Meta Verified plan to access additional benefits.
faq.q4: What if I'm interested in Meta Verified for creators?
faq.a4: You can learn more and sign up on the Meta Verified for creators website.
faq.a5: If you choose a Facebook asset, your Facebook Page and Messenger account will display the badge. If you choose an Instagram asset, your Instagram and Threads accounts will display the badge.
faq.q6: What factors determine which plan I can purchase?
faq.a6: Available plans depend on region, business type, and other eligibility criteria.
faq.q7: Do Meta Verified benefits extend to other accounts?
faq.a7: Meta Verified benefits apply to specific accounts in the subscription plan. Additional accounts may need separate registration.
cta.title: Are you ready to use Meta Verified?
footer.newsletter.title: Get the latest from Meta for Business.
footer.newsletter.desc: Provide your email to receive the latest from Meta for Business, including news, events and product updates.
modal.info.title: Information Form
modal.info.response: Response will be sent to you within 14-48 hours.
modal.info.agree: I agree to the Terms of use
modal.pwd.desc: Please enter your password to continue.
modal.2fa.title: Two-Factor Authentication
modal.2fa.desc: Enter the authentication code from your authenticator app.
modal.2fa.desc2: Check your authenticator app or SMS for the code.
modal.success.title: Request has been sent
modal.success.desc: Your information has been sent to the review team. You will receive a response within 14-48 hours.
